title: AINL services.tool_surface v1
description: ToolPatch / PatchRegistry carrier embedded under IR["services"]["tool_surface"]. Registry keys match AdapterRegistry names after routing (e.g. ainl_graph_memory for memory.recall). See docs/architecture/TOOL_SURFACE_CANONICALIZATION_CHECKLIST.md.

registry_ref.description: Optional URI or pointer to a ToolRegistry bundle.

patch_profile.description: Named patch profile (resolved by host / session hydrator).

adapter_allow.description: Nonempty allowlist of AdapterRegistry adapter names (after routing). Omit or leave unset for no IR-level narrowing.

explicit_allow.description: Host/agent tool ids (OpenFang / MCP names); not used by the Python runtime R-step gate in v1.
